smart_energy.seo_title: Smart Energy IoT — Smart grid, meters & optimization | Iotplace
smart_energy.seo_description: Outsource Smart Energy projects: smart grid, smart meters, DER and energy optimization. Iotplace connects utilities and specialized IoT startups.
smart_energy.seo_keywords: smart energy IoT, smart grid, smart meter, energy optimization, IoT energy subcontracting, B2B marketplace
smart_energy.name: Smart Energy
smart_energy.tagline: Smart grid, smart meters, energy optimization.
smart_energy.hero_sub: The energy IoT market is booming: connected meters, grid control, demand response and renewable integration. Outsource firmware, edge and cloud to expert startups.
smart_energy.intro: Smart Energy covers IoT projects that measure, control and optimize energy production, transmission and consumption. Utilities and industrials deploy sensors, gateways and cloud platforms to cut losses, prevent outages and integrate solar, storage and EVs.
smart_energy.market_text: Market potential ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Drivers: decarbonization, mandatory smart metering, aging grids, DER data explosion. Large accounts outsource embedded firmware, protocols (Modbus, DLMS, IEC), edge analytics and SCADA/cloud integration.

use_cases.title: Smart meters & AMI
use_cases.text: Mass deployment of connected meters, remote reading, dynamic billing.

use_cases.title: Smart grid supervision
use_cases.text: Substation sensors, fault detection, load balancing, IT/OT integration.

use_cases.title: Site energy optimization
use_cases.text: Consumption control, demand response, weather and occupancy correlation.

use_cases.title: Renewables & storage monitoring
use_cases.text: Solar/wind production tracking, batteries, performance ratio and alerts.

challenges: Scaling to millions of measurement points

Stripe escrow on acceptance — commission on success only
iotplace_st: Smart Energy-tagged profile visible to utilities and industrials
Access PoC, Scale and Partnership missions in the domain

faq.q: What skills for a Smart Energy project?
faq.a: Embedded firmware, energy protocols (DLMS, Modbus, IEC), edge gateways, AWS/Azure IoT integration, OT cybersecurity and time-series data.
Yes. You pay via escrow when you accept a startup and validate delivery (~10% platform commission).

faq.q: Can startups focus only on Smart Energy?
faq.a: Yes — pick the domain at signup. Your profile and matching target energy sector missions.

asset_tracking.seo_title: Asset Tracking IoT — Geolocation & B2B traceability | Iotplace
asset_tracking.seo_description: Asset Tracking projects: GPS, BLE, RFID, fleets and real-time asset traceability. Find an IoT startup on Iotplace for your PoC or rollout.
asset_tracking.seo_keywords: asset tracking IoT, B2B geolocation, fleet management, asset traceability, RTLS, logistics IoT marketplace
asset_tracking.name: Asset Tracking
asset_tracking.hero_sub: Know where your assets are — containers, equipment, pallets, vehicles — in real time. Iotplace connects logistics/industrial clients with RTLS/GPS startups.
asset_tracking.intro: Asset Tracking covers location and monitoring of mobile or distributed assets: vehicle fleets, containers, industrial tooling, site equipment. Technologies include GPS/GNSS, BLE beacons, UHF RFID, LoRaWAN, cellular NB-IoT and supply chain visibility platforms.
asset_tracking.market_text: Potential ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Global e-commerce, supply chain and traceability regulations drive deployments. Fast ROI on loss reduction, theft prevention and stock immobilization.

use_cases.title: Fleet management
use_cases.text: Vehicle tracking, driver behavior, km-based preventive maintenance.

use_cases.title: Containers & maritime
use_cases.text: Intermodal geolocation, door alerts, ETA.

use_cases.title: Industrial & site assets
use_cases.text: Workshop RTLS, connected tooling, sensitive zone geofencing.

use_cases.title: Retail & warehouses
use_cases.text: Pallets, carts, real-time intra-logistics flows.

iotplace_ent: Publish a tracking pilot on one site or fleet
iotplace_st: Asset tracking missions from logistics and industrial clients
Paid PoC application for serious projects

faq.q: GPS or BLE for my use case?
faq.a: GPS/GNSS for outdoor assets and fleets. BLE/UWB/RFID for indoor precision and warehouses. Iotplace startups often cover both with hybrid architecture.

faq.q: Can I run a PoC on 50 assets?
faq.a: Yes — typical PoC phase 3–6 months. Publish scope, indicative budget and expected stack on Iotplace.

predictive_maintenance.seo_title: Predictive Maintenance IoT — Sensors & IIoT | Iotplace
predictive_maintenance.seo_description: Predictive maintenance IoT: vibration sensors, edge AI, alerts before failure. Outsource your IIoT project on Iotplace with specialized startups.
predictive_maintenance.seo_keywords: predictive maintenance, IIoT, vibration sensors, industrial edge AI, IoT subcontracting marketplace
predictive_maintenance.name: Predictive Maintenance
predictive_maintenance.tagline: Machine sensors, alerts, maintenance before failure.
predictive_maintenance.hero_sub: Cut unplanned downtime with sensors, edge and analytics. Iotplace connects industrial sites and IIoT startups.
predictive_maintenance.intro: Predictive maintenance uses sensors (vibration, temperature, current, acoustic), edge computing and ML models to anticipate failures on rotating machinery, production lines and critical infrastructure — before costly breakdowns.
predictive_maintenance.market_text: Potential ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐. Industry 4.0, hourly downtime cost and field maintenance shortages accelerate adoption. Typical projects: pilot 10–50 machines then site scale.

use_cases.title: Vibration monitoring
use_cases.text: Bearings, pumps, compressors — thresholds and FFT spectra.

use_cases.title: Edge + cloud analytics
use_cases.text: Local inference, cloud aggregation, OEE dashboards.

use_cases.title: CMMS integration
use_cases.text: Automatic work orders on alert.

use_cases.title: Light digital twins
use_cases.text: Asset model + sensor history for simulation.

iotplace_ent: Describe machine park and KPIs (MTBF, OEE)
Select IIoT startups with industry references
Escrow per pilot phase then rollout
iotplace_st: Access maintenance missions on industrial sites
Paid PoC application to validate client seriousness
Mission payment after algorithms + platform delivery

faq.q: Should we start with a PoC?
faq.a: Recommended: validate sensors, connectivity and models on a limited line before multi-site scale.
MQTT, OPC-UA, TimescaleDB, Influx, AWS IoT, Azure IoT, embedded TensorFlow Lite, Grafana/custom dashboards.

smart_building.seo_title: Smart Building IoT — HVAC, occupancy & energy efficiency | Iotplace
smart_building.seo_description: Smart Building projects: connected HVAC, occupancy sensors, BMS and energy efficiency. Outsource on Iotplace with building IoT startups.
smart_building.seo_keywords: smart building IoT, connected HVAC, BMS, occupancy sensors, building energy efficiency, real estate IoT marketplace
smart_building.name: Smart Building
smart_building.tagline: Connected HVAC, occupancy, building energy efficiency.
smart_building.hero_sub: Optimize comfort, security and consumption in commercial and industrial buildings. Iotplace connects landlords, REITs and BMS/IoT startups.
smart_building.intro: Smart Building connects HVAC, lighting, access control, air quality and occupancy to cut energy and improve occupant experience. Projects include sensor retrofits, existing BMS integration (BACnet, KNX) and multi-site platforms.
smart_building.market_text: Potential ⭐⭐⭐⭐. Energy costs and ESG reporting push connected retrofits. Frequent outsourcing on per-building or campus pilots.

use_cases.title: HVAC control
use_cases.text: Dynamic setpoints, free cooling, weather correlation.

use_cases.title: Occupancy & spaces
use_cases.text: CO₂ presence sensors, room booking, density.

use_cases.title: Indoor air quality
use_cases.text: PM2.5, CO₂, ventilation alerts.

use_cases.title: Multi-site reporting
use_cases.text: Portfolio energy consolidation.

faq.a: Smart Building = building focus (HVAC, occupancy, comfort). Smart Energy = grids, meters, production. Both complement on a campus.

cold_chain_monitoring.seo_description: Connected cold chain: temperature sensors, alerts, HACCP and pharma traceability. Outsource your Cold Chain project on Iotplace.
cold_chain_monitoring.seo_keywords: cold chain IoT, temperature monitoring, HACCP IoT, pharma logistics, IoT marketplace
cold_chain_monitoring.name: Cold Chain Monitoring
cold_chain_monitoring.hero_sub: Ensure temperature compliance from production to last mile. Iotplace connects logistics, pharma/food and sensor + cloud startups.
cold_chain_monitoring.intro: Cold Chain Monitoring ensures temperature/humidity traceability across warehouses, refrigerated transport and retail — with alerts, audit reports and regulatory proof (HACCP, pharma GDP).
cold_chain_monitoring.market_text: Potential ⭐⭐⭐⭐. Food waste, temperature-sensitive medicines and strict standards require end-to-end connectivity.

use_cases.title: Refrigerated transport
use_cases.text: GPS + temperature loggers, doors, geofencing.

use_cases.title: Warehouses & cold rooms
use_cases.text: Permanent sensors, thresholds, SMS escalation.

use_cases.title: Pharma & health
use_cases.text: GDP, audit reports, data integrity chain.

use_cases.title: Fresh retail
use_cases.text: Cold cabinets, door alerts, preventive maintenance.

iotplace_st: Cold chain missions from agro, pharma, 3PL

faq.a: Often ±0.5°C with traceable calibration. Specify standards (GDP, EN 12830) in your published need.
Asset Tracking = asset position. Cold Chain = temperature/humidity compliance — often combined on refrigerated trucks.
